items.title: Walsall name ex-Huddersfield boss Grant head coach
items.summary: League Two side Walsall appoint Lee Grant as their new head coach, replacing Darren Byfield who was given the job until the end of the season.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: How high should Jacob Misiorowski rank?
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Scotland top CWCL2 after narrow win over USA
items.summary: Scotland triumph in another nail-biting match as they beat USA by two runs and move to the top of Cricket World Cup League 2 after rain affected proceedings again in Nepal.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
